summary: Comprehensive testing of WiseDrive OBD2 SDK 4 new features completed. All 47 tests passed (100%). Features tested: 1) Client receives plain JSON (verified sendToEndpoint sends unencrypted JSON when isWiseDrive=false), 2) SDK error logging with encrypted submission (SDKErrorReporter.kt verified), 3) GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows (publish-snapshot.yml and publish-release.yml verified), 4) Client integration guide (docs/CLIENT_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md verified with all required sections). E2E encrypted submission to faircar.in:9768 with JWT auth working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: SecureWiseDriveAnalytics.kt: Correctly implements dual submission - WiseDrive receives encrypted data with JWT Bearer auth, Client receives plain JSON
SDKErrorReporter.kt: Well-structured singleton with error queue, batch flush, encrypted submission, and JWT auth
publish-snapshot.yml: Correctly triggers on main/develop push, adds -SNAPSHOT suffix, uses JFrog secrets
publish-release.yml: Correctly triggers on tags/releases, extracts version from tag, runs unit tests, generates release notes
CLIENT_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md: Comprehensive guide with all required sections including plain JSON explanation, backend examples, and FAQ
seed_data_creation: None - all tests use dynamically generated data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features fully tested and verified: 1) Client plain JSON submission works (isWiseDrive=false path sends unencrypted JSON), 2) SDKErrorReporter sends encrypted error logs with JWT auth, 3) CI/CD workflows correctly configured for snapshot and release publishing, 4) Client integration guide is comprehensive. E2E test to faircar.in:9768 verified working with JWT Bearer token. Kotlin SDK compiles successfully. No issues found.

client_plain_json.details: sendToEndpoint with isWiseDrive=false sends plain JSON via POST without encryption

wisedrive_encrypted.details: sendToEndpoint with isWiseDrive=true encrypts with RSA-4096+AES-256-GCM and uses JWT Bearer auth

sdk_error_reporter.details: SDKErrorReporter.kt is a singleton with error queue, batch flush, encrypted submission to same endpoint

cicd_workflows.details: publish-snapshot.yml (main/develop push) and publish-release.yml (tags/releases) correctly configured

client_integration_guide.details: docs/CLIENT_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md has all required sections including plain JSON explanation
